name: How does workers comp decide fault for my injury in Boise?

mainEntity.name: How does workers comp decide fault for my injury in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.description: No fault needed—pure no-fault industrial insurance for work injuries.[2][3] Covers regardless of who erred.[1] Key factors: Must be arising out of/in course of employment. Practical guidance: Focus on work connection, not blame; helps claims go smoother. Fault irrelevant unless third-party suit.
